violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Ham dated 2/6 was not redated for thaw date. -Open sour cream was not date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Debris build up in bin used to store scrubbers and knives at 3 comp sink. -Some residue/splatter at interior of door of refrigerator next to entrance. -Crumb debris at refrigerator gaskets. -Grease residue at electrical near back door.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Single-use cups lids and napkins are stored directly on the counter at the register.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
